
# <font color=#ffe211> :star: cpp in ebnf  </font>
> <font color=#39c5bb> Caution: Some rules are not implement by compiler. </font>


```ebnf
<declaration> ::= <name_declaration> | <special_declaration>

<name_declaration> ::= 
                <block_declaration>
              | <nodeclspec_function_declaration>
              | <function_definition>
              | <friend_type_declaration>
              | <template_declaration>
              | <deductioin_guide>
              | <linkage_specification>
              | <namespace_definition>
              | <empty_declaration>
              | <attribute_declaration>
              | <module_import_declaration>
<special_decl> ::= <explicit_instantiation>
                 | <explicit_specialization>
                 | <export_declaration>

<module_declaration> ::= 
   ["export"] "module" [<module_name>] [<module_partition>] [<attribute_specifier_seq>] ';'

(***************************************)

<block_declaration> ::=
                 <simple_declaration>
               | <asm_declaration>
               | <namespace_alias_definition>
               | <using_declaration>
               | <using_enum_declaration>
               | <using_directive>
               | <static_assert_declaration>
               | <consteval_block_declaration>
               | <alias_declaration>
               | <opaque_enum_declaration>

(#######################################)
 <simple_declaration>
 <asm_declaration>
 <namespace_alias_definition>
 <using_declaration>
 <using_enum_declaration>
 <using_directive>
 <static_assert_declaration>
 <consteval_block_declaration>
 <alias_decl>
 <opaque_enum_declaration>
 <nodeclspec_function_declaration>
 <function_definition>
 <friend_type_declaration>
 <template_declaration>
 <deductioin_guide>
 <linkage_specification>
 <namespace_definition>
 <empty_declaration>
 <attribute_declaration>
 <module_import_declaration>
 <explicit_instantiation>
 <explicit_specialization>
 <export_declaration>

 <module_name>
 <module_partition>
```


## <font color = #ffe211> :star: simple\_declaration  </font>

```ebnf
<simple_declaration> ::=        <decl_specifier_seq> [<init_declarator_list>]';'
  | [<attribute_specifier_seq>] <decl_specifier_seq>  <init_declarator_list> ';'
  |  <structured_binding_declaration>  <initializer> ';'

(************************************)
<decl_specifier_seq> ::= <decl_specifier> [<attribute_specifier_seq>]
                       | <decl_specifier>  <decl_specifier_seq>

<init_declarator_list> ::= <init_declarator> {',' <init_declarator_list>}

<structured_binding_declaration> ::= [<attribute_specifier_seq>] <decl_specifier_seq>
                              [<ref_qualifier>] '[' <sb_identifier_list> ']'

(************************************)
<ref_qualifier> ::= '&' | "&&"
<sb_identifier_list> ::= <sb_identifier> {',' <sb_identifier>}

<init_declarator> ::= <declarator>  <initializer>
                    | <declarator> [<requires_clause>] [<function_contract_specifier_seq>]

(************************************)
<sb_identifier> ::= ["..."] <identifier> [<attribute_specifier_seq>]

<requires_clause> ::= "requires" <constraint_logical_or_expression>

<function_contract_specifier_seq> ::= 
   <function_contract_specifier> [<function_contract_specifier_seq>]

(************************************)
<function_contract_specifier> ::= <precondition_specifier>
                                | <postcondition_specifier>

(************************************)
<precondition_specifier> ::= "pre" [<attribute_specifier_seq>]
                               '(' <conditional_expression> ')'
<postcondition_specifier> ::= "post" [<attribute_specifier_seq>]
    '(' [<result_name_introducer>] <conditional_expression> ')'

(************************************)
<result_name_introducer> ::= <attribute_identifier> ':'

(************************************)
<attribute_identifier> ::= <identifier> [<attribute_specifier_seq>]

(####################################)
 <attribute_specifier_seq>
 <initializer>
 <decl_specifier>
 <declarator>
 <constraint_logical_or_expression>
 <conditional_expression>
 <identifier>
```

### <font color = #ffe211> :sparkles: attribute\_specifier\_seq  </font>

```ebnf
<attribute_specifier_seq> ::= <attribute_specifier> [<attribute_specifier_seq>]

(***************************************)
<attribute_specifier> ::= "[[" [<attribute_using_prefix>] <attribute_list> "]]"
                        | "[[" <annotation_list> "]]"
                        |      <alignment_specifier>

(***************************************)
<attribute_using_prefix> ::= "using" <attribute_namespace> ':'

<attribute_list> ::= ([<attribute>] | <attribute> "...")
                  {',' <attribute_list>}

<annotation_list> ::= <annotation> ["..."]
                 {',' <annotation_list>}

<alignment_specifier> ::= "alignas" '(' <type_id> ["..."] ')'
                        | "alignas" '(' <constant_expression> ["..."] ')'

(***************************************)
<attribute_namespace> ::= <identifier>

<annotation> ::= '=' <constant_expression>

<attribute> ::= <attribute_token> [<attribute_argument_clause>]


(***************************************)
<attribute_token> ::= <identifier> 
                    | <attribute_scoped_token>

<attribute_argument_clause> ::= '(' [<balanced_token_seq>] ')'

(***************************************)
<attribute_scoped_token> ::= <attribute_namespace> "::" <identifier>

<balanced_token_seq> ::= <balanced_token> [<balanced_token_seq>]

(***************************************)
<balanced_token> ::= '(' [<balanced_token_seq>] ')'
                   | '[' [<balanced_token_seq>] ']'
                   | '{' [<balanced_token_seq>] '}'
                   | "[:" [<balanced_token_seq>] ":]"
                   | ? any token other than {'(',')','[',']','{','}','[:',':]'} ?

(#######################################)
 <constant_expression>
 <type_id>
```

### <font color = #ffe211> :sparkles: initializer  </font>

```ebnf
<initializer> ::= <brace_or_equal_initializer>
                | '(' <initializer_list> ')'

(************************************)
<brace_or_equal_initializer> ::= '=' <initializer_clause>
                               | <braced_init_list>

<initializer_list> ::= <initializer_clause> ["..."]
                      {',' <initializer_list>}

(************************************)
<initializer_clause> ::= <assignment_expression>
                       | <braced_init_list>

<braced_init_list> ::= '{' <initializer_list> [','] '}'
                     | '{' <designated_initializer_list> [','] '}'
                     | "{}"

(************************************)
<designated_initializer_list> ::= <designated_initializer_clause>
                             {',' <designated_initializer_clause>}

(************************************)
<designated_initializer_clause> ::= <designator> <brace_or_equal_initializer>

(************************************)
<designator> ::= '.' <identifier>

(####################################)
 <assignment_expression>
```

### <font color = #ffe211> :sparkles: decl\_specifier  </font>

```ebnf
<decl_specifier> ::= ("friend"|"typedef"|"inline")
                   | ("constexpr"|"consteval"|"constinit")
                   | <storage_class_specifier>
                   | <defining_type_specifier>
                   | <function_specifier>

<type_specifier_seq> ::= <type_specifier>  <type_specifier_seq>
                       | <type_specifier> [<attribute_specifier_seq>]

(***************************************)
<storage_class_specifier> ::= "static" | "extern"
                            | "thread_local" | "mutable"

<defining_type_specifier> ::= <type_specifier> 
                            | <class_specifier>
                            | <enum_specifier>

<function_specifier> ::= "virtual"
                       | "explicit" ['(' <constant_expression> ')']

<type_specifier> ::= <simple_type_specifier>
                   | <elaborated_type_specifier>
                   | <typename_specifier>
                   | <cv_qualifier>

(***************************************)
<simple_type_specifier> ::=
      [<nested_name_specifier>] <type_name>
   |  [<nested_name_specifier>] <template_name>
   |   <nested_name_specifier> "template" <simple_template_id>
   |   <computed_type_specifier>
   |   <placeholder_type_specifier>
   | "char" | "char8_t"
   | "char16_t"| "char32_t"
   | "wchar_t"
   | "bool"
   | "short"|"int"|"long"
   | "signed"|"unsigned"
   | "float"|"double"
   | "void"

<elaborated_type_specifier> ::= 
     <class_key> [<attribute_specifier_seq>] [<nested_name_specifier>] <identifier>
   | <class_key>  <simple_template_id>
   | <class_key>  <nested_name_specifier> ["template"] <simple_template_id>
   | "enum"      [<nested_name_specifier>] <identifier>

<typename_specifier> ::=
     "typename" <nested_name_specifier> <identifier>
   | "typename" <nested_name_specifier> "template" <simple_template_id>

(* use std::atomic template instead of _Atomic *)
<cv_qualifier> ::= "const" | "volatile"
                 | ? __restrict ?
                 | ? __restrict__ ?

(***************************************)
<type_name> ::= <enum_name>
              | <class_name>
              | <typedef_name>

<computed_type_specifier> ::= <decltype_specifier>
                            | <pack_index_specifier>
                            | <splice_type_specifier>

<placeholder_type_specifier> ::= [<type_constraint>] "auto"
                               | [<type_constraint>] "decltype(auto)"

(***************************************)
<typedef_name> ::= <identifier> | <simple_template_id>
<enum_name> ::= <identifier>

<decltype_specifier> ::= "decltype" '(' <expression> ')'
<pack_index_specifier> ::= <typedef_name> "..." '[' <constant_expression> ']'
<splice_type_specifier> ::= ["typename"] <splice_specifier>
                          | ["typename"] <splice_specialization_specifier>

<type_constraint> ::= [<nested_name_specifier>] <concept_name>
                    | [<nested_name_specifier>] <concept_name> [<template_argument_list>]

(***************************************)
<concept_name> ::= <identifier>

(#######################################)
 <class_specifier>
 <enum_specifier>
 <constant_expression>

 <identifier>
 <nested_name_specifier>
 <template_name>
 <simple_template_id>
 <class_key>
 <class_name>

 <expression>

 <splice_specifier>
 <splice_specialization_specifier>

 <template_argument_list>
```

#### <font color = #ffe211> :rocket: identifier  </font>

```ebnf
<identifier> ::= <identifier_start> {<identifier_continue>}

<unqualified_id> ::= <identifier>
                   | <operator_function_id>
                   | <conversion_function_id>
                   | <literal_operator_id>
                   | '~' <type_id>
                   | '~' <computed_type_specifier>
                   | <template_id>

<qualified_id> ::= <nested_name_specifier> ["template"] <unqualified_id>

(***************************************)
<identifier_start> ::= <nondigit> 
                     | ? UNICODE XID_Start属性的源字符集里的字符 ?
<identifier_continue> ::= <nondigit> | <digit>
                     | ? UNICODE XID_Continue属性的源字符集里的字符 ?

<operator_function_id> ::= "operator" <operator>
<conversion_function_id> ::= "operator" <conversion_type_id>
<literal_operator_id> ::= "operator" <unevaluated_string> <identifier>
                        | "operator" <user_defined_string_literal>

<template_id> ::= <simple_template_id>
                | <operator_function_id> '<' [<template_argument_list>] '>'
                | <literal_operator_id>  '<' [<template_argument_list>] '>'

<nested_name_specifier> ::=
    "::"
  | <type_name> "::"
  | <namespace_name> "::"
  | <computed_type_specifier> "::"
  | <splice_scope_specifier> "::"
  | <nested_name_specifier> <identifier> "::"
  | <nested_name_specifier> "template" <simple_template_id> "::"

(***************************************)
<nondigit> ::= 'a'|..|'z'|'A'|..|'Z'|'_'
<digit> ::= '0'|..|'9'

<operator> ::= 
  "new"|"delete"|"new[]"|"delete[]"|"co_await"
 |"()"|"[]"|"->"|"->*"|"~"|"!"
 |"+"|"-"|"*"|"/"|"%"|"^"
 |"&"|"|"
 |"="|"+="|"-="
 |"*="|"/="|"%="|"^="|"&="|"|="
 |"=="|"!="|"<"|">"|"<="|">="|"<=>"
 |"&&"|"||"
 |"<<"|">>"
 |"<<="|">>="
 |"++"|"--"
 |","


<namespace_name> ::= <identifier> | <namespace_alias>
<splice_scope_specifier> ::= <splice_specifier>
                           | ["template"] <splice_specialization_specifier>
<simple_template_id> ::= <template_name> '<' [<template_argument_list>] '>'

<conversion_type_id> ::= <type_specifier_seq> [<conversion_declarator>]
<unevaluated_string> ::= <string_literal>

<template_argument_list> ::= <template_argument> ["..."]
                           | {',' <template_argument_list> }

(***************************************)
<namespace_alias> ::= <identifier>
<template_name> ::= <identifier>

<splice_specifier> ::= "[:" <constant_expression> ":]"
<splice_specialization_specifier> ::= 
               <splice_specifier> '<' [<template_argument_list>] '>'

<conversion_declarator> ::= <ptr_operator> [<conversion_declarator>]

<template_argument> ::= <constant_expression>
                       | <type_id>
                       | [<nested_name_specifier>] <template_name>
                       |  <nested_name_specifier> "template" <template_name>

(#######################################)
 <type_name>
 <type_id>
 <computed_type_specifier>
 <ptr_operator>

 <constant_expression>

 <user_defined_string_literal>
 <string_literal>
```


#### <font color = #ffe211> :rocket: class\_specifier  </font>

```ebnf
<class_specifier> ::= <class_head> '{' [<member_specification>]'}'

(***************************************)
<class_head> :: <class_key> [<attribute_specifier_seq>] [<class_head_name>]
                [<class_property_specifier_seq>] [<base_clause>]
              | <class_key> [<attribute_specifier_seq>] [<base_clause>]

<member_specification> ::= <member_declaration>   [<member_specification>]
                         | <access_specifier> ':' [<member_specification>]

(***************************************)
<class_key> ::= "struct" | "class" | "union"

<class_head_name> ::= [<nested_name_specifier>] <class_name>
<class_property_specifier_seq> ::= <class_property_specifier> 
                                  [<class_property_specifier_seq>]

<base_clause> ::= ':' <base_specifier_list>

<member_declaration> ::= 
   [<attribute_specifier_seq>] [<decl_specifier_seq>] [<member_declarator_list>] ';'
  | <function_definition>
  | <friend_type_declaration>
  | <using_declaration>
  | <using_enum_declaration>
  | <static_assert_declaration>
  | <consteval_block_declaration>
  | <template_declaration>
  | <explicit_specialization>
  | <deductioin_guide>
  | <alias_declaration>
  | <opaque_enum_declaration>
  | <empty_declaration>

<access_specifier> ::= "private" 
                     | "public"
                     | "protected"

(***************************************)
<class_property_specifier> ::= "final"
    | "trivially_relocatable_if_eligible"
    | "replaceable_if_eligible"

<class_name> ::= <identifier> | <simple_template_id>

<base_specifier_list> ::= <base_specifier> ["..."]
                     {',' <base_specifier_list>}

<member_declarator_list> ::= <member_declarator> 
                        {',' <member_declarator>}

<friend_type_declaration> ::= "friend" <friend_type_specifer_list>

(***************************************)
<base_specifier> ::= 
      [<attribute_specifier_seq>] <class_or_decltype>
    | [<attribute_specifier_seq>] "virtual" [<access_specifier>] <class_or_decltype>
    | [<attribute_specifier_seq>] [<access_specifier>] "virtual" <class_or_decltype>

<member_declarator> ::= 
  <declarator> [<virt_specifier_seq>]
               [<function_contract_specifier_seq>] [<pure_specifier>]
| <declarator>  <requires_clause> 
               [<function_contract_specifier_seq>]
| <declarator> <brace_or_equal_initializer>
|[<identifier>] [<attribute_specifier_seq>] 
              ':' <constant_expression> [<brace_or_equal_initializer>]

<friend_type_specifer_list> :: <friend_type_specifer> {',' <friend_type_specifer>}


(***************************************)
<class_or_decltype> ::= [<nested_name_specifier>] <type_name>
                      | [<nested_name_specifier>] "template" <simple_template_id>
                      |  <computed_type_specifier>

<virt_specifier_seq> ::= "override" | "final"
<pure_specifier> ::= '=' '0'

<friend_type_specifer> ::= <simple_type_specifier>
                         | <elaborated_type_specifier>
                         | <typename_specifier>


(#######################################)
 <attribute_specifier_seq>
 <nested_name_specifier>

 <computed_type_specifier>

 <declarator>
 <function_contract_specifier_seq>
 <requires_clause>

 <brace_or_equal_initializer>

 <decl_specifier_seq>
 <simple_type_specifier>
 <elaborated_type_specifier>
 <typename_specifier>

 <function_definition>
 <friend_type_declaration>
 <using_declaration>
 <using_enum_declaration>
 <static_assert_declaration>
 <consteval_block_declaration>
 <template_declaration>
 <explicit_specialization>
 <deductioin_guide>
 <alias_declaration>
 <opaque_enum_declaration>
 <empty_declaration>

(*************
***  In <declaration>,
***  those not contained in <member_specification>
***  are the following:
***
***   <nodeclspec_function_declaration>
***   <linkage_specification>
***   <namespace_definition>
***   <attribute_declaration>
***   <module_import_declaration>
***   <explicit_instantiation>
***   <export_declaration>
***   <asm_declaration>
***   <namespace_alias_definition>
***   <using_directive>
***   <simple_declaration> (* indeed not *)
***   (* <simple_declaration> uses <init_declarator_list> *)
***   (* <member_declaration> uses <member_declarator_list> *)
*************)
```

#### <font color = #ffe211> :rocket: enum\_specifier  </font>

```ebnf
<enum_specifier> ::= <enum_head> '{' [<enumerator_list>] '}'
                   | <enum_head> '{'  <enumerator_list> ',' '}'

(***************************************)
<enum_head> ::= 
   <enum_key> [<attribute_specifier_seq>] [<enum_head_name>] [<enum_base>]

<enumerator_list> ::= <enumerator_definition> 
                 {',' <enumerator_list> }


(***************************************)
<enum_key> ::= "enum"
             | "enum class"
             | "enum struct"
<enum_head_name> ::= [<nested_name_specifier>] <identifier>
<enum_base> ::= ':' <type_specifier_seq>

<enumerator_definition> ::= <enumerator>
                          | <enumerator> '=' <constant_expression>

(***************************************)
<enumerator> ::= <identifier> [<attribute_specifier_seq>]

(#######################################)
 <attribute_specifier_seq>
 <type_specifier_seq>

 <nested_name_specifier>
 <identifier>
```


#### <font color = #ffe211> :rocket: expression  </font>

```ebnf
<expression> ::= <assignment_expression> {',' <assignment_expression>}

<constant_expression> ::= <conditional_expression>

<constraint_logical_or_expression> ::=
   <constraint_logical_and_expression>
 | <constraint_logical_or_expression> "||" <constraint_logical_and_expression>

(***************************************)
<assignment_expression> ::=
   <conditional_expression>
 | <yield_expression>
 | <throw_expression>
 | <logical_or_expression> <assignment_operator> <initializer_clause>

<conditional_expression> ::=
   <logical_or_expression>
 | <logical_or_expression> '?' <expression> ':' <assignment_expression>

 <constraint_logical_and_expression> ::=
    <primary_expression>
  | <constraint_logical_and_expression> "&&" <primary_expression>

(***************************************)
<assignment_operator> ::= '=' | "*=" | "/=" | "%=" |"+=" | "-="
                        | ">>=" | "<<=" | "&=" | "^=" | "|="

<yield_expression> ::= "co_yield" <assignment_expression>
                     | "co_yield" <braced_init_list>

<throw_expression> ::= "throw" [<assignment_expression>]

(#######################################)
 <initializer_clause>
 <conditional_expression>
 <logical_or_expression>

 <braced_init_list>
 <primary_expression>
```

#### <font color = #ffe211> :rocket: conditional\_expression  </font>

```ebnf
<conditional_expression> ::=
   <logical_or_expression>
 | <logical_or_expression> '?' <expression> ':' <assignment_expression>

(***************************************)

<logical_or_expression> ::= 
   <logical_and_expression>
 | <logical_or_expression> "||" <logical_or_expression>

(***************************************)
<logical_or_expression> ::= 
   <inclusive_or_expression>
 | <logical_and_expression> "&&" <inclusive_or_expression>

(***************************************)
<inclusive_or_expression> ::= 
   <exclusive_or_expression>
 | <inclusive_or_expression> "|" <exclusive_or_expression>

(***************************************)
<exclusive_or_expression> ::= 
   <and_expression>
 | <exclusive_or_expression> "^" <and_expression>

(***************************************)
<and_expression> ::= 
   <equality_expression>
 | <and_expression> "&" <equality_expression>

(***************************************)
<equality_expression> ::= 
   <relational_expression>
 | <equality_expression> "==" <relational_expression>
 | <equality_expression> "!=" <relational_expression>

(***************************************)
<relational_expression> ::= 
   <compare_experssion>
 | <relational_expression> "<" <compare_experssion>
 | <relational_expression> "<=" <compare_experssion>
 | <relational_expression> ">" <compare_experssion>
 | <relational_expression> ">=" <compare_experssion>

(***************************************)
<compare_experssion> ::=
   <shift_expression>
 | <compare_experssion> "<=>" <shift_expression>

(***************************************)
<shift_expression> ::=
   <additive_expression>
 | <shift_expression> "<<" <additive_expression>
 | <shift_expression> ">>" <additive_expression>

(***************************************)
<additive_expression> ::=
   <multiplicative_expression>
 | <additive_expression> "+" <multiplicative_expression>
 | <additive_expression> "-" <multiplicative_expression>

(***************************************)
<multiplicative_expression> ::=
   <pm_expression>
 | <multiplicative_expression> "*" <pm_expression>
 | <multiplicative_expression> "/" <pm_expression>
 | <multiplicative_expression> "%" <pm_expression>

(***************************************)
<pm_expression> ::=
   <cast_expression>
 | <pm_expression> ".*" <cast_expression>
 | <pm_expression> "->*" <cast_expression>

(***************************************)
<cast_expression> ::=
   <unary_expression>
 | '(' <type_id> ')' <cast_expression>

(***************************************)
<unary_expression> ::=
     <postfix_expression>
   | <unary_operator> <cast_expression>
   | "++" <cast_expression>
   | "--" <cast_expression>
   | <await_expression>
   | "sizeof" <unary_expression>
   | "sizeof" '(' <type_id> ')'
   | "sizeof" "..." '(' <identifier> ')'
   | "alignof" '(' <type_id> ')'
   | <noexcept_expression>
   | <new_expression>
   | <delete_expression>
   | <reflect_expression>

(***************************************)
<unary_operator> ::= '*' | '&' 
                   | '+' | '-' 
                   | '!' | '~'

<await_expression> ::= "co_await" <cast_expression>
<noexcept_expression> ::= "noexcept" '(' <expression> ')'
<new_expression> ::= 
   ["::"] "new" [<new_placement>] <new_type_id>     [<new_initializer>]
 | ["::"] "new" [<new_placement>] '(' <type_id> ')' [<new_initializer>]

<delete_expression> ::= 
   ["::"] "delete"      <cast_expression>
 | ["::"] "delete" "[]" <cast_expression>

<reflect_expression> ::= "^^" "::"
                       | "^^" <reflect_name>
                       | "^^" <type_id>
                       | "^^" <id_expression>

<postfix_expression> ::= 
   <primary_expression>
 | <postfix_expression> '[' [<expression_list>] ']'
 | <postfix_expression> '(' [<expression_list>] ')'
 | <simple_type_specifier> '(' [<expression_list>] ')'
 | <typename_specifier> '(' [<expression_list>] ')'
 | <simple_type_specifier> <braced_init_list>
 | <typename_specifier> <braced_init_list>
 | <postfix_expression> '.' ["template"] <id_expression>
 | <postfix_expression> '.' <splice_expression>
 | <postfix_expression> "->" ["template"] <id_expression>
 | <postfix_expression> "->" <splice_expression>
 | <postfix_expression> "++"
 | <postfix_expression> "--"
 | "dynamic_cast"     '<' <type_id> '>' '(' <expression> ')'
 | "static_cast"      '<' <type_id> '>' '(' <expression> ')'
 | "reinterpret_cast" '<' <type_id> '>' '(' <expression> ')'
 | "const_cast"       '<' <type_id> '>' '(' <expression> ')'
 | <type_id> '(' <expression> ')'
 | <type_id> '(' <type_id> ')'

(***************************************)
<new_type_id> ::= <type_specifier_seq> [<new_declarator>]
<new_initializer> ::= '(' [<expression_list>] ')'
                    | <braced_init_list>

<new_placement> ::= '(' <expression_list> ')'

<reflect_name> ::= 
   [<nested_name_specifier>]            <identifier>
 |  <nested_name_specifier>  "template" <identifier>


<expression_list> ::= <initializer_list>

(***************************************)
<new_declarator> ::= <ptr_operator> [<new_declarator>]
                   | <noptr_new_declarator>

(***************************************)
<noptr_new_declarator> ::= '[' [<expression>] ']'          [<attribute_specifier_seq>]
  | <noptr_new_declarator> '[' [<constant_expression>] ']' [<attribute_specifier_seq>]

(#######################################)
 <type_id>
 <id_expression>
 <identifier>

 <simple_type_specifier>
 <typename_specifier>
 <braced_init_list>

 <expression>

 <initializer_list>

 <type_name>

 <assignment_expression>

 <ptr_operator>

 <splice_expression>
 <primary_expression>
```

#### <font color = #ffe211> :rocket: primary\_expression  </font>

```ebnf
<primary_expression> ::= <literal>
                       | "this"
                       | '(' <expression> ')'
                       | <id_expression>
                       | <lambda_expression>
                       | <fold_expression>
                       | <requires_expression>
                       | <splice_expression>

(***************************************)
<lambda_expression> ::= 
   <lambda_introducer> [<attribute_specifier_seq>]
                        <lambda_declarator> <compound_statement>
 | <lambda_introducer> '<' <template_parameter_list> '>' 
                        <requires_clause> [<attribute_specifier_seq>]
                        <lambda_declarator> <compound_statement>

<fold_expression> ::=
   '(' <cast_expression> <fold_operator> "..." ')'
 | '(' "..." <fold_operator> <cast_expression> ')'
 | '('<cast_expression> <fold_operator> "..." <fold_operator> <cast_expression> ')'

<requires_expression> ::= "requires" [<requirement_parameter_list>] <requirement_body>

<splice_expression> ::= <splice_specifier>
                      | "template" <splice_specifier>
                      | "template" <splice_specialization_specifier>

(***************************************)
<lambda_introducer> ::= '[' [<lambda_capture>] ']'
<lambda_declarator> ::= 
   <lambda_specifier_seq> [<noexcept_specifier>]
   [<attribute_specifier_seq>] [<trailing_return_type>]
   [<function_contract_specifier_seq>]
 | <noexcept_specifier> 
   [<attribute_specifier_seq>] [<trailing_return_type>]
   [<function_contract_specifier_seq>]
 | [<trailing_return_type>] [<function_contract_specifier_seq>]
 | '(' <parameter_declaration_clause> ')' [<lambda_specifier_seq>] [<noexcept_specifier>]
   [<attribute_specifier_seq>] [<trailing_return_type>]
   [<requires_clause>] [<function_contract_specifier_seq>]


<fold_operator> ::= 
  "+"  | "-"  | "*"  | "/"   | "%"
| "^"  | "&"  | "|"  | "<<"  | ">>"
| "+=" | "-=" | "*=" | "/="  | "%="
| "^=" | "&=" | "|=" | "<<=" | ">>="
| "="  | "==" | "!=" | "<"   | ">"
| "<=" | ">=" | "&&" | "||"  | ","
| ".*" | "->*"

<requirement_parameter_list> ::= '(' <parameter_declaration_clause> ')'
<requirement_body> ::= '{' <requirement_seq> '}'

(***************************************)
<requirement_seq> ::= <requirement> [<requirement_seq>]

<lambda_capture> ::= <capture_default>
                   | <capture_list>
                   | <capture_default> ',' <capture_list>

<lambda_specifier_seq> ::= <lambda_specifier> [<lambda_specifier_seq>]

<noexcept_specifier> ::= "noexcept" '(' <constant_expression> ')'
                       | "noexcept" 

(***************************************)
<requirement> ::= <simple_requirement>
                | <type_requirement>
                | <compound_requirement>
                | <nested_requirement>

<capture_default> ::= '&' | '='
<capture_list> ::= <capture> {',' <capture>}

<lambda_specifier> ::= "consteval" | "constexpr"
                     | "mutable" | "static"

(***************************************)
<simple_requirement> ::= <expression> ';'
<type_requirement> ::= 
   "typename" [<nested_name_specifier>] <type_name> ';'
 | "typename"  <splice_specifier>
 | "typename"  <splice_specialization_specifier>

<compound_requirement> ::= 
   '{' <expression> '}' ["noexcept"] [<return_type_requirement>] ';'

<nested_requirement> ::= "requires" <constraint_expression> ';'

<capture> ::= <simple_capture> | <init_capture>

(***************************************)
<return_type_requirement> ::= "->" <type_constraint>
<constraint_expression> ::= <logical_or_expression>

<simple_capture> ::= <identifier> ["..."]
                   | '&' <identifier> ["..."]
                   | "this"
                   | '*' "this"
<init_capture> ::= ["..."] <identifier> <initializer>
             | '&' ["..."] <identifier> <initializer>

(#######################################)
 <expression>
 <id_expression>

 <splice_specifier>
 <splice_specialization_specifier>

 <logical_or_expression>
 <type_constraint>

 <cast_expression>
 <requires_clause>

 <template_parameter_list>

 <parameter_declaration_clause>
 <trailing_return_type>
 <function_contract_specifier_seq>

 <identifier>
 <initializer>

 <compound_statement>

 <literal> 
```

#### <font color = #ffe211> :rocket: literal  </font>

```ebnf
<literal> ::= <integer_literal>
            | <character_literal>
            | <floating_point_literal>
            | <string_literal>
            | <boolen_literal>
            | <pointer_literal>
            | <user_defined_literal>

(***************************************)
<integer_literal> ::= <binary_literal> [<integer_suffix>]
                    | <octal_literal> [<integer_suffix>]
                    | <decimal_literal> [<integer_suffix>]
                    | <hexadecimal_literal> [<integer_suffix>]

<character_literal> ::= [<encoding_prefix>] "'" <c_char_sequence> "'"
<floating_point_literal> ::= <decimal_floating_point_literal>
                           | <hexadecimal_floating_point_literal>

<string_literal> ::= <encoding_prefix> '"' [<s_char_sequence>] '"'
                   | <encoding_prefix> 'R'  <raw_string>

<boolen_literal> ::= "false" | "true"
<pointer_literal> ::= "nullptr"

<user_defined_literal> ::= <user_defined_inter_literal>
                         | <user_defined_floating_point_literal>
                         | <user_defined_string_literal>
                         | <user_defined_character_literal>

(***************************************)
<encoding_prefix> ::= 'u'|'U'|"L"|"u8"

<binary_literal> ::= "0b" <binary_digit>
                   | "0B" <binary_digit>
                   | <binary_literal> ["'"] <binary_digit>

<octal_literal> ::= '0' | <octal_literal> ["'"] <octal_digit>
<decimal_literal> ::= <nonzero_digit>
                    | <decimal_literal> ["'"] <digit>
<hexadecimal_literal> ::= ("0x" | "0X") <hexadecimal_digit_sequence>

<integer_suffix> ::= 
   <unsigned_suffix> [<long_suffix>]
 | <unsigned_suffix> [<long_long_suffix>]
 | <unsigned_suffix> [<size_suffix>]
 | <long_suffix> [<unsigned_suffix>]
 | <long_long_suffix> [<unsigned_suffix>]
 | <size_suffix> [<unsigned_suffix>]

<c_char_sequence> ::= <c_char> [<c_char_sequence>]

<s_char_sequence> ::= <s_char> [<s_char_sequence>]


<raw_string> ::= '"' [<d_char_sequence>] 
                 '(' [<r_char_sequence>] ')'
                     [<d_char_sequence>] '"'

<user_defined_inter_literal> ::= 
   <decimal_literal> <ud_suffix>
 | <octal_literal> <ud_suffix>
 | <hexadecimal_literal> <ud_suffix>
 | <binary_literal> <ud_suffix>

<user_defined_floating_point_literal> ::= 
   <fractional_constant> [<exponent_part>] <ud_suffix>
 | <digit_sequence> <exponent_part> <ud_suffix>
 | ("0x"|"0X") <hexadecimal_fractional_constant>
               <binary_exponent_part> <ud_suffix>
 | ("0x"|"0X") <hexadecimal_digit_sequence>
               <binary_exponent_part> <ud_suffix>

<user_defined_string_literal> ::= <string_literal> <ud_suffix>
<user_defined_character_literal> ::= <character_literal> <ud_suffix>

<decimal_floating_point_literal> ::= 
   <fractional_constant> [<exponent_part>] [<floating_point_suffix>]
 | <digit_sequence>       <exponent_part>  [<floating_point_suffix>]

<hexadecimal_floating_point_literal> ::=
   ("0x"|"0X") <hexadecimal_fractional_constant>
               <binary_exponent_part> [<floating_point_suffix>]
 | ("0x"|"0X") <hexadecimal_digit_sequence>
               <binary_exponent_part> [<floating_point_suffix>]

(***************************************)
<ud_suffix> ::= <identifier>

<unsigned_suffix> ::= 'u' | 'U'
<long_suffix> ::= 'l' | 'L'
<long_long_suffix> ::= 'll' | 'LL'
<size_suffix> ::= 'z' | 'Z'

<binary_digit> ::= '0'|'1'
<octal_digit>  ::= '0'|..|'7'
<nonzero_digit> ::= '0'|..|'9'
<digit> ::= '0'|..|'9'
<hexadecimal_digit_sequence> ::=                <hexadecimal_digit>
           | <hexadecimal_digit_sequence> ["'"] <hexadecimal_digit>

<s_char> ::= <basic_s_char>
           | <escape_sequence>
           | <universal_charactor_name>


<c_char> ::= <basic_c_char>
           | <escape_sequence>
           | <universal_charactor_name>

(* brain floatng point,width:16(sign:1,exponent:8,fraction:7) *)
<floating_point_suffix> ::=
   'f'|'l'|"f16"|"f32"|"f64"|"f128"|"bf16"
  |'F'|'L'|"F16"|"F32"|"F64"|"F128"|"BF16"

<fractional_constant> ::= [<digit_sequence>] '.' <digit_sequence>
                        |  <digit_sequence>

<exponent_part> ::= ('e'|'E') [<sign>] <digit_sequence>

<digit_sequence> ::= <digit> 
                   | <digit_sequence> ["'"] <digit>

<hexadecimal_fractional_constant> ::=
   [<hexadecimal_digit_sequence>] '.' <hexadecimal_digit_sequence>
 |  <hexadecimal_digit_sequence>  '.'

<hexadecimal_digit_sequence> ::= <hexadecimal_digit>
       | <hexadecimal_digit_sequence> ["'"] <hexadecimal_digit>

<binary_exponent_part> ::= ('p'|'P') [<sign>] <digit_sequence>

<r_char_sequence> ::= <r_char> {<r_char>}
<d_char_sequence> ::= <d_char> {<d_char>}

(***************************************)
(* translation_character_set >= source_character_set *)
<basic_c_char> ::= ? any member of the translation character set 
                     except the U+0027 APOSTROPHE "'",
                     U+005C REVERSE SOLIDUS "\",
                     or physical new_line character ?

<escape_sequence> ::= <simple_escape_sequence>
                    | <numeric_escape_sequence>
                    | <conditional_escape_sequence>


<hexadecimal_digit> ::= '0'|..|'9'
                      | 'a'|..|'f'
                      | 'A'|..|'F'

<sign> ::= '+'|'-'

<basic_s_char> ::= ? any member of the translation character set
                     except the U+0022 QUOTATION MARK,
                                U+005c REVERSE SOLIDUS,
                                 or new_line character ?

<r_char> ::= ? any member of the translation character set
                     except the U+0029 RIGHT PARENTHESIS followed by
                     the initial d_char_sequence(which may be empty)followed
                     by a U+0022 QUOTATION MARK ?

<d_char> ::= ? any member of the basic character set
                     except U+0020 space,
                            U+0028 left parenthesis,
                            U+0029 right parenthesis,
                            U+005c reverse solidus,
                            U+0009 character tabulation,
                            U+000b line tabulation,
                            U+000c form feed,
                            and new-line ?

<universal_charactor_name> ::=
   "\u" <hex_quad>
 | "\U" <hex_quad> <hex_quad>
 | "\u" '{' <simple_hexadecimal_digit_sequence '}'
 | <named_universal_character>

(***************************************)
<simple_escape_sequence> ::= 
   '\' <simple_escape_sequence_char>

<numeric_escape_sequence> ::= <octal_escape_sequence>
                            | <hexadecimal_escape_sequence>

<conditional_escape_sequence> ::= '\' <conditional_escape_sequence_char>

(* hex_quad 2byte *)
<hex_quad> ::= 4 * <hexadecimal_digit>

<named_universal_character> ::= "\N" '{' <n_char_sequence> '}'

(***************************************)
<octal_escape_sequence> ::= '\' <octal_digit>
                          | '\' <octal_digit> <octal_digit>
                          | '\' <octal_digit> <octal_digit> <octal_digit>
                          | '\o' {<simple_octal_digit_sequence>}

<hexadecimal_escape_sequence> ::= 
   '\x'     <simple_hexadecimal_digit_sequence>
 | '\X' '{' <simple_hexadecimal_digit_sequence> '}'

<simple_escape_sequence_char> ::= "'"|'"'|'?'
                                 |'a'|'b'|'f'
                             |'n'|'r'|'t'|'v'

(* source_character_set >= basic_character_set *)
<conditional_escape_sequence_char> ::=
   ? any member of 
     the basic character set that is not 
     an octal_digit,a simple_escape_sequence_char
     or the characters N,o,u,U,x ?
        
<n_char_sequence> ::= <n_char> {<n_char>}

(***************************************)
<simple_octal_digit_sequence> ::= <octal_digit> 
                                 [<simple_octal_digit_sequence>]

<simple_hexadecimal_digit_sequence> ::= <hexadecimal_digit>

<n_char> ::= ? any member of the translation character set
               except the U+007D RIGHT CURLY BRACKET
               or new_line character ?
```

#### <font color = #ffe211> :rocket: compound\_statement  </font>

```ebnf
<compound_statement> ::= '{' [<statement_seq>] [<label_seq>] '}'

(***************************************)
<statement_seq> ::= <statement> [<statement_seq>]
<label_seq> ::= <label> [<label_seq>]

(***************************************)
<label> ::= [<attribute_specifier_seq>] <identifier> ':'
          | [<attribute_specifier_seq>] "default" ':'
          | [<attribute_specifier_seq>] "case" <constant_expression> ':'

<statement> ::= <labeled_statement>
              | [<attribute_specifier_seq>] <expression_statement>
              | [<attribute_specifier_seq>] <compound_statement>
              | [<attribute_specifier_seq>] <selection_statement>
              | [<attribute_specifier_seq>] <iteration_statement>
              | [<attribute_specifier_seq>] <expansion_statement>
              | [<attribute_specifier_seq>] <jump_statement>
              | [<attribute_specifier_seq>] <assertion_statement>
              | [<attribute_specifier_seq>] <try_block>
              |  <declaration_statement>

(***************************************)
<labeled_statement> ::= <label> <statement>

<expression_statement> ::= [<expression>] ';'

<selection_statement> ::= 
   "if" ["constexpr"] '(' [<init_statement>] <condition> ')' <statement>
 | "if" ["constexpr"] '(' [<init_statement>] <condition> ')' <statement>
   "else" <statement>
 | "if" ['!'] ["consteval"] <compound_statement>
 | "if" ['!'] ["consteval"] <compound_statement>
   "else" <statement>
 | "switch" '(' [<init_statement>] <condition> ')' <statement>

<iteration_statement> ::= 
   "while" '(' <condition> ')' <statement>
 | "do" <statement> "while" '(' <condition> ')' ';'
 | "for" '(' <init_statement> [<condition>] ';' [<expression>] ')'
         <statement>
 | "for" '(' [<init_statement>] <for_range_declaration> 
           ':' <for_range_initializer> ')' <statement>

<expansion_statement> ::= 
   "template" "for" '(' [<init_statement>] <for_range_declaration> 
                      ':' <expansion_initializer> ')' <compound_statement>

<jump_statement> ::= "break" ';'
                   | "continue" ';'
                   | "return" [<expr_or_braced_init_list>] ';'
                   | <coroutine_return_statement>
                   | "goto" <identifier> ';'

<assertion_statement> ::= "contract_assert" [<attribute_specifier_seq>]
                          '(' <conditional_expression> ')' ';'

<try_block> ::= "try" <compound_statement> <headler_seq>

<declaration_statement> ::= <block_declaration>

(***************************************)
<init_statement> ::= <expression_statement>
                   | <simple_declaration>
                   | <alias_declaration>

<condition> ::= 
   <expression>
 | [<attribute_specifier_seq>] <decl_specifier_seq>
    <declarator> <brace_or_equal_initializer>
 | <structured_binding_declaration>

<for_range_declaration> ::= 
   [<attribute_specifier_seq>] <decl_specifier_seq> <declarator>
 |  <structured_binding_declaration>

<for_range_initializer> ::= <expr_or_braced_init_list>

<expansion_initializer> ::= <expression>
                          | <expansion_init_list>

<coroutine_return_statement> ::= 
   "co_return" [<expr_or_braced_init_list>] ';'

<headler_seq> ::= "catch" '(' <exception_declaration> ')'
                  <compound_statement>

(***************************************)
<expr_or_braced_init_list> ::= <expression>
                             | <braced_init_list>

<expansion_init_list> ::= '{' [<expression_list>] '}'

<exception_declaration> ::= 
   [<attribute_specifier_seq>] <type_specifier_seq> <declarator>
 | [<attribute_specifier_seq>] <type_specifier_seq> [<abstract_declarator>]
 | "..."

(#######################################)
 <identifier>
 <constant_expression>
 <attribute_specifier_seq>

 <simple_declaration>
 <alias_declaration>

 <expression>
 <braced_init_list>

 <decl_specifier_seq>
 <declarator>
 <abstract_declarator>
 <brace_or_equal_initializer>

 <structured_binding_declaration>
 <expression_list>

 <conditional_expression>

 <block_declaration>
```

### <font color = #ffe211> :sparkles: declarator  </font>

```ebnf
<declarator> ::= <ptr_declarator> 
               | <noptr_declarator> <parameters_and_qualifiers> <trailing_return_type>

(***************************************)
<ptr_declarator> ::= <noptr_declarator>
                   | <ptr_operator> <ptr_declarator>

<noptr_declarator> ::=
     <declarator_id> [<attribute_specifier_seq>]
   | <noptr_declarator> <parameters_and_qualifiers>
   | <noptr_declarator> '[' <constant_expression> ']' [<attribute_specifier_seq>]
   | '(' <ptr_declarator> ')'

<parameters_and_qualifiers> ::= '(' <parameter_declaration_clause> ')'
                                   [<cv_qualifier_seq>]
                                   [<ref_qualifier>] [<noexcept_specifier>]
                                   [<attribute_specifier_seq>]

<trailing_return_type> ::= "->" <type_id>

(***************************************)
<ptr_operator> ::=              '*' [<attribute_specifier_seq>] [<cv_qualifier_seq>]
      | <nested_name_specifier> '*' [<attribute_specifier_seq>] [<cv_qualifier_seq>]
      | '&' [<attribute_specifier_seq>]
      | "&&" [<attribute_specifier_seq>]

<declarator_id> ::= ["..."] <id_expression>

<cv_qualifier_seq> ::= <cv_qualifier> [<cv_qualifier_seq>]

<parameter_declaration_clause> ::= [<parameter_declaration_list>]
                                 |  <parameter_declaration_list> "..."
                                 |  <parameter_declaration_list> ',' "..."
                                 |  "..."


<type_id> ::= <type_specifier_seq> [<abstract_declarator>]

(***************************************)
<id_expression> ::= <unqualified_id>
                  | <qualified_id>
                  | <pack_index_expression>

<parameter_declaration_list> ::= <parameter_declaration>
                            {',' <parameter_declaration_list>}

(***************************************)
<pack_index_expression> ::= <id_expression> "..." '[' <constant_expression> ']'

<parameter_declaration> ::= 
   [<attribute_specifier_seq>] ["this"] <decl_specifier_seq> <declarator>
 | [<attribute_specifier_seq>] ["this"] <decl_specifier_seq> [<abstract_declarator>]
 | [<attribute_specifier_seq>] <decl_specifier_seq> <declarator>
    '=' <initializer_clause>
 | [<attribute_specifier_seq>] <decl_specifier_seq> [<abstract_declarator>]
    '=' <initializer_clause>

(#######################################)
 <attribute_specifier_seq>
 <constant_expression>
 <nested_name_specifier>

 <unqualified_id>
 <qualified_id>

 <decl_specifier_seq>
 <initializer_clause>

 <abstract_declarator>

 <ref_qualifier>
 <noexcept_specifier>
```

### <font color = #ffe211> :sparkles: abstract\_declarator </font>

```ebnf
<abstract_declarator> ::= 
   <ptr_abstract_declarator>
 | [<noptr_abstract_declarator>] <parameters_and_qualifiers> <trailing_return_type>
 | <abstract_pack_declarator>

(***************************************)
<ptr_abstract_declarator> ::= <noptr_abstract_declarator>
                            | <ptr_operator> [<ptr_abstract_declarator>]

<noptr_abstract_declarator> ::= 
   '(' <ptr_abstract_declarator> ')'
 | [<noptr_abstract_declarator>] <parameters_and_qualifiers>
 | [<noptr_abstract_declarator>]
  '[' [<constant_expression>] ']' [<attribute_specifier_seq>]

<abstract_pack_declarator> ::= <noptr_abstract_pack_declarator>
                             | <ptr_operator> <abstract_pack_declarator>

(***************************************)
<noptr_abstract_pack_declarator> ::= "..."
       | <parameters_and_qualifiers> <noptr_abstract_pack_declarator>

(#######################################)
 <parameters_and_qualifiers>
 <trailing_return_type>
 <ptr_operator>
 <constant_expression>
 <attribute_specifier_seq>
```



## <font color=#ffe211> :star: asm\_declaration  </font>

```ebnf
<asm_declaration> ::= 
   [<attribute_specifier_seq>] "asm" '(' <balanced_token_seq> ')' ';'

(#######################################)
 <attribute_specifier_seq>
 <balanced_token_seq>
```


## <font color=#ffe211> :star: namespace\_alias\_definition  </font>

```ebnf
<namespace_alias_definition> ::= 
   "namespace" <identifier> '=' <qualified_namespace_specifier> ';'
 | "namespace" <identifier> '=' <splice_specifier> ';'

(***************************************)
<qualified_namespace_specifier> ::=
   [<nested_name_specifier>] <namespace_name>

(***************************************)
<namespace_name> ::= <identifier>
                   | <namespace_alias>

(***************************************)
<namespace_alias> ::= <identifier>

(#######################################)
 <splice_specifier>
 <identifier>
 <nested_name_specifier>
```

## <font color=#ffe211> :star: using\_declaration  </font>

```ebnf
<using_declaration> ::= "using" <using_declaration_list> ';'

(***************************************)
<using_declaration_list> ::= <using_declarator> ["..."]
                        {',' <using_declaration_list>}

(***************************************)
<using_declarator> ::= ["typename"] <nested_name_specifier> <unqualified_id>

(#######################################)
 <nested_name_specifier>
 <unqualified_id>
```

## <font color=#ffe211> :star: using\_enum\_declaration  </font>

```ebnf
<using_enum_declaration> ::= "using enum" <using_enum_declarator> ';'

(***************************************)
<using_enum_declarator> ::= [<nested_name_specifier>] <identifier>
                          | [<nested_name_specifier>] <simple_template_id>
                          | <splice_type_specifier>

(#######################################)
 <identifier>
 <nested_name_specifier>
 <simple_template_id>
 <splice_type_specifier>
```

## <font color=#ffe211> :star: using\_directive  </font>

```ebnf
<using_directive> ::= 
   [<attribute_specifier_seq>] "using namespace" <splice_specifier> ';'
 | [<attribute_specifier_seq>] "using namespace"
   [<nested_name_specifier>] <namespace_name> ';'

(#######################################)
 <attribute_specifier_seq>
 <nested_name_specifier>
 <splice_specifier>
 <namespace_name>
```

## <font color=#ffe211> :star: static\_assert\_declaration   </font>

```ebnf
<static_assert_declaration> ::= 
   "static_assert" '(' <constant_expression> ')' ';'
 | "static_assert" '(' <constant_expression> ',' <static_assert_messsage> ')' ';'

(***************************************)
<static_assert_messsage> ::= <unevaluated_string>
                           | <constant_expression>

(#######################################)
 <unevaluated_string>
 <constant_expression>
```

## <font color=#ffe211> :star: consteval\_block\_declaration  </font>

```ebnf
<consteval_block_declaration> ::= "consteval" <compound_statement>

(#######################################)
 <compound_statement>
```

## <font color=#ffe211> :star: alias\_declaration  </font>

```ebnf
<alias_declaration> ::= "using" <identifier> [<attribute_specifier_seq>]
                        '=' <defining_type_id> ';'

(***************************************)
<defining_type_id> ::= <defining_type_specifier_seq> [<abstract_declarator>]

(***************************************)
<defining_type_specifier_seq> ::= 
   <defining_type_specifier> [<attribute_specifier_seq>]
 | <defining_type_specifier> [<defining_type_specifier_seq>]
 
(#######################################)
 <identifier>
 <attribute_specifier_seq>
 <abstract_declarator>
 <defining_type_specifier>
```

## <font color=#ffe211> :star: opaque\_enum\_declaration  </font>

```ebnf
<opaque_enum_declaration> ::= 
   <enum_key> [<attribute_specifier_seq>] <enum_head_name> [<enum_base>] ';'

(#######################################)
 <enum_key>
 <attribute_specifier_seq>
 <enum_head_name>
 <enum_base>
```

## <font color=#ffe211> :star: function\_definition  </font>

```ebnf
<function_definition> ::=
   [<attribute_specifier_seq>] [<decl_specifier_seq>] 
      <declarator> [<virt_specifier_seq>]
      [<function_contract_specifier_seq>]
       <function_body> 
 | [<attribute_specifier_seq>] [<decl_specifier_seq>] 
      <declarator>  <requires_clause> 
      [<function_contract_specifier_seq>]
       <function_body> 

<nodeclspec_function_declaration> ::=
   [<attribute_specifier_seq>] <declarator> ';'

(***************************************)
<function_body> ::= [<ctor_initializer>] <compound_statement>
                  |  <function_try_block> 
                  |  '=' "default" ';'
                  |  <deleted_function_body>

(***************************************)
<ctor_initializer> ::= ':' <mem_initializer_list>

<function_try_block> ::= "try" [<ctor_initializer>]
                         <compound_statement> <handler_seq>

<deleted_function_body> ::= '=' "delete" ';'
                          | '=' "delete" '(' <unevaluated_string> ')' ';'

(***************************************)
<mem_initializer_list> ::= <mem_initializer> ["..."]
                    | {',' <mem_initializer_list>}

<handler_seq> ::= <handler> {<handler>}

(***************************************)
<mem_initializer> ::= <mem_initializer_id> '(' [<expression_list>] ')'
                    | <mem_initializer_id>      <braced_init_list>

(***************************************)
<mem_initializer_id> ::= <class_or_decltype>
                       | <identifier>

(#######################################)
 <attribute_specifier_seq>
 <decl_specifier_seq>
 <declarator>
 <virt_specifier_seq>
 <function_contract_specifier_seq>
 <requires_clause>
 <compound_statement>
 <unevaluated_string>
 <handler>
 <expression_list>
 <braced_init_list>
 <class_or_decltype>
 <identifier>
```

## <font color=#ffe211> :star: template\_declaration  </font>

```ebnf
<template_declaration> ::= <template_head> <declaration>
                         | <template_head> <concept_definition>

(***************************************)
<template_head> ::=
   "template" '<' <template_parameter_list> '>' [<requires_clause>]

<concept_definition> ::= 
   "concept" <concept_name> [<attribute_specifier_seq>] 
   '=' <constraint_expression>

(***************************************)
<template_parameter_list> ::= <template_parameter>
                         {',' <template_parameter>}

(***************************************)
<template_parameter> ::= <type_parameter>
                       | <parameter_declaration>
                       | <type_tt_parameter>
                       | <variable_tt_parameter>
                       | <concept_tt_parameter>

(***************************************)
<type_parameter> ::= <type_parameter_key> ["..."] [<identifier>]
                   | <type_parameter_key> [<identifier>] '=' <type_id>
                   | <type_constraint> ["..."] [<identifier>]
                   | <type_constraint>  [<identifier>] '=' <type_id>

<type_tt_parameter> ::= 
   <template_head> <type_parameter_key> ["..."] [<identifier>]
 | <template_head> <type_parameter_key> [<identifier>] <type_tt_parameter_default>

<variable_tt_parameter> ::= 
   <template_head> "auto" ["..."] [<identifier>]
 | <template_head> "auto"         [<identifier>] 
                   '=' [<nested_name_specifier>] <template_name>

<concept_tt_parameter> ::=
   "template" '<' <template_parameter_list> '>' "concept" ["..."] [<identifier>]
 | "template" '<' <template_parameter_list> '>' "concept"         [<identifier>]
              '=' [<nested_name_specifier>] <template_name>

(***************************************)
<type_parameter_key> ::= "class" | "typename"

<type_tt_parameter_default> ::= 
   '=' [<nested_name_specifier>] <template_name>
 | '=' [<nested_name_specifier>] "template" <template_name>

(#######################################)
 <requires_clause>
 <declaration>
 <concept_name>
 <attribute_specifier_seq>
 <constraint_expression>
 <parameter_declaration>
 <identifier>
 <type_id>
 <type_constraint>
 <nested_name_specifier>
 <template_name>
```


## <font color=#ffe211> :star: deductioin\_guide  </font>

```ebnf
<deductioin_guide> ::=
   [<explicit_specifier>] <template_name> '(' <parameter_declaration_clause> ')'
   "->" <simple_template_id> [<requires_clause>] ';'

(***************************************)
<explicit_specifier> ::= "explicit" '(' <constant_expression> ')'
                       | "explicit"

(#######################################)
 <parameter_declaration_clause>
 <template_name>

 <simple_template_id>
 <requires_clause>

 <constant_expression>
```

## <font color=#ffe211> :star: linkage\_specification  </font>

```ebnf
<linkage_specification> ::= "extern" <unevaluated_string> <name_declaration>
                          | "extern" <unevaluated_string>
                             '{' [<declaration_seq>] '}'

(***************************************)
<declaration_seq> ::= <declaration> {<declaration>}

(#######################################)
 <unevaluated_string>
 <name_declaration>
 <declaration>
 <unevaluated_string>
```

## <font color=#ffe211> :star: namespace\_definition  </font>

```ebnf
<namespace_definition> ::=   <named_namespace_definition>
                         | <unnamed_namespace_definition>
                         |  <nested_namespace_definition>

(***************************************)
<named_namespace_definition> ::=
   ["inline"] "namespace" [<attribute_specifier_seq>]
   <identifier>
   '{' <namespace_body> '}'

<unnamed_namespace_definition> ::=
   ["inline"] "namespace" [<attribute_specifier_seq>]
   '{' <namespace_body> '}'

<nested_namespace_definition>
    "namespace" [<enclosing_namespace_specifier>] "::"
    ["inline"] <identifier>
   '{' <namespace_body> '}'

(***************************************)
<enclosing_namespace_specifier> ::= <identifier>
<namespace_body> ::= <declaration_seq>

(#######################################)
 <attribute_specifier_seq>
 <identifier>
 <declaration_seq>
```

## <font color=#ffe211> :star: empty\_declaration  </font>

```ebnf
<empty_declaration> ::= ';'
```

## <font color=#ffe211> :star: attribute\_declaration  </font>

```ebnf
<attribute_declaration> ::= <attribute_specifier_seq> ';'
```

## <font color=#ffe211> :star: module\_import\_declaration  </font>

```ebnf
<module_import_declaration> ::= 
   "import" <module_name>      [<attribute_specifier_seq>] ';'
 | "import" <module_partition> [<attribute_specifier_seq>] ';'
 | "import" <header_name> [<attribute_specifier_seq>] ';'

(***************************************)
<module_name> ::= [<module_name_qualifier>] <identifier>
<module_partition> ::= ':' [<module_name_qualifier>] <identifier>
<header_name> ::= '<' <h_char_sequence> '>'
                  '"' <q_char_sequence> '"'

(***************************************)
<module_name_qualifier> ::= <identifier> '.'
                           {<module_name_qualifier>} 

<h_char_sequence> ::= <h_char> {<h_char>}
<q_char_sequence> ::= <q_char> {<q_char>}

(***************************************)
<h_char> ::= ? any member of the translation character set
               except new_line and U+003E GREATER_THAN SIGN ?
<q_char> ::= ? any member of the translation character set
               except new_line and U+0022 QUOTATION MARK ?

(#######################################)
 <attribute_specifier_seq>
 <identifier>
```

## <font color=#ffe211> :star: explicit\_instantiation  </font>

```ebnf
<explicit_instantiation> ::= ["extern"] "template" <declaration>

(#######################################)
 <declaration>
```

## <font color=#ffe211> :star: explicit\_specialization  </font>

```ebnf
<explicit_specialization> :: "template" "<>" <declaration>

(#######################################)
 <declaration>
```

## <font color=#ffe211> :star: export\_declaration  </font>

```ebnf
<export_declaration> ::= "export" <name_declaration>
                       | "export" '{' [<declaration_seq>] '}'
                       | "export" <module_import_declaration>

(#######################################)
 <name_declaration>
 <module_import_declaration>
```



# <font color=#ffe211>:star: 字符集 :</font>

## <font color=#ffe211> :sparkles: ASCII </font>
> <font color=#39c5bb>ASCII(american standard code for information interchange)</font>    

<font color=#39c5bb>$ scope:0 \sim 127(2^7-1) $</font>

## <font color=#ffe211> :sparkles: UTF </font>
> <font color=#39c5bb>UTF(unicode trasformation format)</font>    
> <font color=#39c5bb>BMP(Basic Multilingual Plane),U+0000~U+FFFF</font>    

<font color=#ffa500>

|codec|u8|u16|u32|
|---|---|---|---|
|byte|1~4|2or4| 4 |
|BOM(byte order mark)|~~[EF BB BF]~~|le[FF FE]<br>be[FE FF]|le[FF FE 00 00]<br>be[00 00 FE FF]|
|recognize|1byte:0xxxxxxxx<br>2byte:110xxxxx 10xxxxxx<br>3byte:1110xxxx 10xxxxxx 10xxxxxx<br>4byte:11110xxx 10xxxxxx 10xxxxxx 10xxxxxx|2byte:BMP代理区外<br>非[0xD800,0xDFFF]<br><br>4byte:高+低(代理)<br>高:[0xD800,0xDBFF]<br>低:[0xDC00,0xDFFF]|4byte固定|

</font>


* <font color=#ffe211> :rocket: 字符常量及字面量,字面值 :rocket:</font>

<font color=#ffa500>

|   |常量|字面量|
|---|---|---|
|`char`|`''` `u8''`|`""` `u8""`|
|`wchar_t`|`L''`|`L""`|
|`char16_t`|`u''`|`u""`|
|`char32_t`|`U''`|`U""`|

|后缀suffix|整数后|浮点后|
|---       |---   |---   |
|u/U       |unsigned|    |
|l/L       | long |long double|
|ll/LL  |long long|      |
|f/F       |      | float|
|ul,lu,ull,llu...|||     

</font>

> <font color=#39c5bb>字面量编码是实现定义的,从执行字符集到指定的编码的映射</font>    

## <font color=#ffe211> :sparkles: GB </font>
> <font color=#39c5bb>GB(国标),K(扩)</font>    

<font color=#ffa500>

|codec|gb2312|gbk|gb18030|
|---|---|---|---|
|byte|1byte:[0x00,0x7e]<br><br>2byte:<br>首[0xa1,0xf7]<br>尾[0xa1,0xfe]|1byte:[0x00,0x7e]<br><br>2byte:<br>首[0x81,0xfe]<br>尾[0x40,0xfe]|1byte:[0x00,0x7e]<br><br>2byte:<br>首[0x81,0xfe]<br>尾[0x40,0xfe]<br><br>4byte:<br>首[0x81,0xfe]<br>次[0x30,0x39]<br>三[0x81,0xfe]<br>四[0x30,0x39]|

</font>

# <font color=#ffe211> :star: cc1plus翻译阶段  </font>

<font color=#ffa500>

|1.字符映射|1.映射为源字符集<br>2.处理双三标符|
|:-|:-|
|2.行拼接|1.拼接`\`结束行|
|3.预处理记号化|1.源文件最大吞噬分解为注释,空白字符,预处理记号<br>2.一个空格替换每段注释<br>3.保持换行符|
|4.预处理|1.执行预处理器<br>2.include引入文件都递归执行1~4阶段<br>3.结束后移除预处理器指令|
|5.字符集转换|1.字符常量字面量及转义序列从源字符集转换为执行字符集|
|6.字符串连接|1.连接相邻的字符串|
|7.编译|1.按语法和语义分析记号,翻译成汇编|
|8.模板|1.产生所要求的模板实例化列表并进行实例化产生实例化单元|
|9.链接|1.汇编到机械码as,链接库ld|

</font>

> <font color=#39c5bb>基本源字符集={5个空白符(space,\t,\v,\f,\n),10个数字,52个大小写字母,29个标点}</font>    
> <font color=#39c5bb>源字符集:源文件字符编码,包括基本源字符集</font>    

> <font color=#39c5bb>基本执行字符集={基本源字符集,\n,\r,\a,\b,\0}</font>    
> <font color=#39c5bb>执行字符集:程序所用字符编码,包括基本执行字符集</font>    
> <font color=#39c5bb>g++:-finput-charset=,-fexec-charset=,-fwide-exec-charset=</font>    

> <font color=#39c5bb>\<ciso646\>:</font>

<font color=#ffa500>

|基本|双标符|三标符(c23移)|
|---|---|---|
|{|<%|??<|
|}|%>|??>|
|[|<:|??(|
|]|:>|??)|
|#|%:|??=|
|#|%:%:|??=??=|
|&#92;||??/|
|^||??'|
|\|||??!|
|~||??-|

</font>

> <font color=#39c5bb>预处理记号:</font>    
>> <font color=#ffa500>头文件名</font>    
>> <font color=#ffa500>标识符</font>    
>> <font color=#ffa500>预处理数字</font>    
>> <font color=#ffa500>字符常量与字符串字面量</font>    
>> <font color=#ffa500>运算符与标点</font>    
>> <font color=#ffa500>其它非空白字符</font>    

> <font color=#39c5bb>最大吞噬原则:词法分析器会尽可能多地读取字符以形成最长的有效token</font>    

> <font color=#39c5bb>转义序列:</font>    
>> <font color=#ffa500>简单转义序列:`\'` `\"` `\?` `\\` `\a` `\b` `\f` `\n` `\r` `\t` `\v`</font>    
>> <font color=#ffa500>数值转义序列:8进制`\nnn` 16进制`\xnn`</font>    
>> <font color=#ffa500>通用字符名:`\unnnn` `\Unnnnnnnn`</font>    


# <font color=#ffe211> :star: 概念 </font>

## <font color=#ffe211> :sparkles: 换算 </font>

<font color=#ffa500>

|1byte|8bit|
|---|---|
|2byte|1word|
|4byte|1dword|
|8byte|1qword|
|1hex|4bit|
|2hex|1byte|

</font>

> <font color=#39c5bb>n进制m位内容量:$n^m$</font>    
> <font color=#39c5bb>最大值=容量-1</font>    
> <font color=#39c5bb>字节容量转换:$(2)^8 = (2^4)^2 < (2^3)^3 $</font>    

## <font color=#ffe211> :sparkles: 端序 </font>
```c
do{
	std::uint16_t v=1;

	//&v low addr byte
	if(*reinterpret_cast<std::uint8_t*>(&v) == 1){
		std::cout << "小端:低字节放低地址" << std::endl;
		break;
	}

	std::cout << "大端:高字节放低地址" << std::endl;
}while(0);
```

## <font color=#ffe211> :sparkles: 对象 </font>
> <font color=#39c5bb>在cpp中,一个对象拥有这些性质：</font>    

<font color=#ffa500>

|存储期|
|---|
|大小|
|对齐要求|
|存储期|
|生存期|
|类型|
|值|
|名字(opt)|

</font>

> <font color=#39c5bb>对象表示：对象字节序列;对象表示相同，比较相等，逆命题不成立</font>    
> <font color=#39c5bb>陷阱表示：无映射对应值的对象表示(NaN,SNaN,NaT...)</font>    

## <font color=#ffe211> :sparkles: 对齐 </font>
> <font color=#39c5bb>每个完整对象类型拥有一个对齐要求属性(`std::size_t`类型的整数),</font>    
> <font color=#39c5bb>可以alignof,`std::alignment_of`查看,</font>    
> <font color=#39c5bb>表示可以分配的相继地址之间的字节数;</font>    


## <font color=#ffe211> :sparkles: 作用域 </font>

> <font color=#39c5bb>cpp中名字只在作用域中有效,</font>    
> <font color=#39c5bb>能用无限定名字查找将名字与其声明关联起来;</font>    

> <font color=#39c5bb>潜在作用域:名字从出现位置到对应作用域结束;</font>    
> <font color=#39c5bb>实际作用域:名字真正能被使用的区域,潜在作用域的子集;</font>    

<font color=#ffa500>

|作用域|说明|
|---|---|
|块作用域|块内声明的潜在作用域为整个块<br>实际作用域与潜在作用域相同<br>内嵌块同名声明与外层相互排除|
|函数形参作用域|潜在作用域从声明点开始<br>到声明符末尾,或函数体末尾,或try块末尾结束|
|命名空间作用域|潜在作用域从声明点开始<br>拼接后续同名命名空间<br>再加上using所引入位置的作用域|
|类作用域|潜在作用域从声明点开始<br>包含类体剩余部分<br>和所有函数体,默认实参,异常规定,类内花括号或等号初始化器<br>递归地包括嵌套类中所有这些内容|
|枚举作用域|无作用域enum或enum struct时潜在作用域从声明点开始,<br>外层作用域末尾结束<br><br>有作用域enum class潜在作用域从声明点开始,<br>说明符末尾结束|
|模板形参作用域|模板形参名的潜在作用域从声明点开始,<br>持续到模板声明的末尾|

</font>

> <font color=#39c5bb>声明点</font>:
>> <font color=#ffa500>`<simple_declaration>`中`<declarator>`之后,`<initializer>`之前(如果存在)</font>;    
>> <font color=#ffa500>`<alias_declaration>`中`<defining_type_id>`之后;</font>    
>> <font color=#ffa500>`<class_name>`之后;</font>    
>> <font color=#ffa500>`<template_name>`之后;</font>    
>> <font color=#ffa500>`<using_declarator>`之后;</font>    
>> <font color=#ffa500>`<enum_head_name>`之后;</font>    
>> <font color=#ffa500>`<enum_definition>`之后;</font>    
>> <font color=#ffa500>`__func__`声明点在`<function_body>`之前;</font>    
>> <font color=#ffa500>`<sb_identifier_list>`之后;</font>    
>> <font color=#ffa500>范围for`<expansion_statement>`中`<compound_statement>`之前;</font>    
>> <font color=#ffa500>`<template_parameter>`之后;</font>    

## <font color=#ffe211> :sparkles: 生存期 </font>
> <font color=#39c5bb>对象生存期与它的存储的生存期相同或者内嵌其中</font>    
> <font color=#39c5bb>引用对象在引用前结束,会造成悬垂引用</font>    
> <font color=#39c5bb>非静态数据和基类子对象的生存期按照类初始化顺序开始和结束</font>    

> <font color=#39c5bb>开始于:</font>    
>> <font color=#ffa500>获得拥有它的类型的正确大小与对齐的存储，并且</font>    
>> <font color=#ffa500>完成它的初始化(如果存在)</font>     
>> <font color=#ffa500>或隐式创建并开始</font>     
>> <font color=#ffa500>除非是联合体成员或它的子对象,那么是被初始化成员或被设为活跃才开始</font>    
>> <font color=#ffa500>除非是内嵌于联合体对象,那么在赋值或构造含有它的联合体才开始</font>    
>> <font color=#ffa500>除非是数组对象,可以因std::allocator::allocate分配开始</font>    

> <font color=#39c5bb>结束于:</font>    
>> <font color=#ffa500>非类型销毁该对象时</font>    
>> <font color=#ffa500>类类型析构函数调用开始时</font>    
>> <font color=#ffa500>对象所占据存储被释放或被不内嵌于它的对象重用时</font>    

## <font color=#ffe211> :sparkles: 临时对象实质化 </font>
> <font color=#39c5bb>临时对象销毁是在包含创建它的位置的完整表达式的求值过程的最后一步</font>    
> <font color=#39c5bb>创建了多个临时对象时,销毁顺序和出栈顺序一样</font>    
> <font color=#39c5bb>绑定到引用可以延长临时对象生存期</font>    

> <font color=#39c5bb>创建临时对象的情况:</font>    
>> <font color=#ffa500>绑定引用到纯右值prvalue</font>    
>> <font color=#ffa500>以花括号初始化列表初始化`std::initializer_list<T>`类型的对象时</font>    
>> <font color=#ffa500>函数返回纯右值prvalue</font>    
>> <font color=#ffa500>lambda表达式</font>    
>> <font color=#ffa500>要求对初始化器进行类型转换的复制初始化</font>    
>> <font color=#ffa500>将引用绑定到不同但可以转换的类型或绑定到位域</font>    
>> <font color=#ffa500>当对类类型的纯右值进行成员访问时</font>    
>> <font color=#ffa500>当对数组纯右值进行数组向指针转换或下标运算时</font>    
>> <font color=#ffa500>对sizeof和typeid的不求值操作数</font>    
>> <font color=#ffa500>当纯右值被用作弃值表达式时</font>    
>> <font color=#ffa500>现实支持：函数调用表达式中传递或返回可平凡复制的类型的对象时</font>    

## <font color=#ffe211> :sparkles: 定义 </font>
> <font color=#39c5bb>定义是完全定义了声明中所引入的实体的声明</font>    
> <font color=#39c5bb>`<declaration>`中提供实体完整信息的为定义</font>    


## <font color=#ffe211> :sparkles: ODR </font>
> <font color=#39c5bb>`One_Definition_Rule` :每个翻译单元中都只允许有一个定义</font>    
> <font color=#39c5bb>(非inline,其中部分可以有多个声明)</font>    


## <font color=#ffe211> :sparkles: ADL </font>
> <font color=#39c5bb>`Argument_Dependent_lookup`:</font>    
> <font color=#ffa500>无限定函数名可以在实参的命名空间中找,</font>    
> <font color=#ffa500>不同于普通查找只会找当前作用域和using引入</font>    


## <font color=#ffe211> :sparkles: As-if rule </font>
> <font color=#39c5bb>As-if rule:允许任何不改变程序可观测行为的代码转换，编译器需要保证：</font>
>> <font color=#ffa500>volatile的可观测副作用</font>    
>> <font color=#ffa500>文件输出顺序与程序一致不重排</font>    
>> <font color=#ffa500>交互式提示先出现再输入</font>    
>> <font color=#ffa500>浮点可观测时不破坏语义</font>    


## <font color=#ffe211> :sparkles: UB </font>
> <font color=#39c5bb>正确的cpp程序没有UB(undefined behaviour)</font>    

<font color=#ffa500>

| UB 类别 | 说明 / 示例 |
|---|---|
| **有符号整数溢出** | `int x = INT_MAX; x++;`//UB，因为有符号整数算术超出表示范围。 |
| **移位越界** | `1 << 32`(在 32 位 int 上)或负数位移`1 << -1`|
| **越界访问** | 访问数组下标超出范围 |
| **生命周期外访问** | 使用析构或 `delete` 掉的对象 |
| **对齐错误** | 更强的对齐要求和地址模对齐不等于0：<br> `char buf[4]; int* pi=(int*)(buf+1);` |
| **解引用空指针** | `int* p = nullptr; *p;` |
| **悬空指针或悬空引用访问** | `int* p = new int(1); delete p; *p;` |
| **无效转换（strict aliasing 违背）** | 用不兼容类型指针访问对象：`float f=1.0; printf("%d", *(int*)&f);` |
| **对 realloc 旧指针解引用** | `p = malloc(10); q = realloc(p,20); *p = 1;`//UB（p 已无效）|
| **使用未初始化标量** | `int x; x++;` |
| **非法位模式** | (uint8\_t*)&b = (uint8_t)value;//UB:bool b不保证是0/1 |
| **双重修改 / 修改+读取无序冲突** | `i = i++;` 或 `a[i] = i++;` |
| **除零** | `int x = 1/0;` |
| **无副作用的无限循环** | `for(;;) {}` （如果没有任何可观察副作用）。 |
| **goto/longjmp 到不活跃作用域** | `goto` 跳过变量初始化，或跳入已离开作用域 |
| **调用未定义函数行为** | 调用未声明函数或声明定义原型不匹配。 |
| **restrict 违规** | 通过 `__restrict__` 限定的两个指针同时指向同一对象并被使用。 |
| **调用约定冲突** | 原型与定义不一致，或 ABI(Binary) 约定不同导致 UB。 |
| **使用未初始化的库对象** | 使用未通过 `fopen` 初始化的 `FILE*`。 |
| **传入无效指针** | `strlen(NULL); memcpy(NULL, buf, 10);` |
| **memcpy 源和目标重叠** | 必须用 `memmove`，否则 UB。 |
| **数据竞争 (data race)** | 多线程并发访问同一对象且至少一个是写操作，没有同步。 |
| **超出实现限制** | 过长的标识符、过深的递归导致栈溢出等。 |
| **未定义宏或预处理** | 触发标准未定义的预处理行为，例如非法的 `#include` 路径格式。 |
| **以非volatile类型读写volatile类型** | 行为未定义UB |

</font>

## <font color=#ffe211> :sparkles: 抽象机内存模型 </font>
> <font color=#ffe211>每个字节拥有唯一的地址</font>    
> <font color=#ffe211>内存位置:`标量类型的对象`或`非零长位域的最大连续序列`</font>    

## <font color=#ffe211> :sparkles: 求值顺序 </font>    
* <font color=#ffe211> :rocket: 求值 </font>    
> <font color=#39c5bb>对于每个表达式或子表达式有两种求值为编译器进行</font>    

<font color=#ffa500>

|求值||
|---|---|
|值计算|计算表达式所返回的值|
|副作用|读写volatile左值指代的对象、写对象、<br>原子同步、修改文件、修改浮点环境<br>（及调用以上操作的函数）|

</font>

* <font color=#39c5bb> :rocket: 序列点 </font>    

<font color=#ffa500>

|存在序列点|
|---|
|`&&` `\|\|` `,` 左运算数求值后右运算数求值前|
|条件运算`?:`第一运算数求值后，第二或第三运算数求值前|
|完整表达式(分号结束或作为控制条件)的求值后，下个完整表达式求值前|
|函数参数求值后|
|完整声明器的结尾|

</font>

* <font color=#39c5bb> :rocket: 求值排序 </font>    

<font color=#ffa500>

|排序方式||
|---|---|
|sequenced before|序列点前求值先完成|
|sequenced after|序列点后求值先完成|
|unsequenced|无顺序可以并行重排|
|indeterminably-sequnced|可以任意顺序进行但不能重叠|

|排序|
|---|
|运算符的各个操作数的值计算先序于运算符本身的值计算|
|直接赋值`=`与所有复合赋值`e.g.+=`的副效应(写左值)后序于左右参数的值计算|
|`++` `--` 的计算值先序于副效应 |
|不先序也不后序的不同函数调用其求值顺序是未确定的|
|初始化器列表中各表达式的求值顺序是未确定的|
|非确定顺序的函数调用、复合赋值、自增减运算的前后缀形式是单独求值|

</font>

## <font color=#ffe211> :sparkles: 标点 </font>
> <font color=#39c5bb>在\<operator\>中的可以重载</font>    

<font color=#ffa500>

|标点|含义|
|---|---|
|`{}`|列表,块,初始化|
|`[]`|下标,声明|
|`#`|预处理起始,字符串化|
|`##`|宏拼接|
|`()`|分组,划分,参数列表|
|`;`|结束|
|`:`|标签,说明|
|`...`|变参,形参包|
|`?`|条件运算符一部分|
|`::`|作用域解析运算符|
|`.`|访问成员|
|`.*`|访问成员指针|
|`->`|访问成员|
|`->*`|访问成员指针|
|`~`|逐位非运算|
|`!`|逻辑非|
|`+`|加|
|`-`|减|
|`*`|乘,解引用,指针|
|`/`|除|
|`%`|余mod|
|`^`|逐位异或|
|`&`|逐位与,取地址|
|`\|`|逐位或|
|`=`|赋值|
|`+=`|复合运算|
|`-=`|复合运算|
|`*=`|复合运算|
|`/=`|复合运算|
|`%=`|复合运算|
|`^=`|复合运算|
|`&=`|复合运算|
|`\|=`|复合运算|
|`==`|等于|
|`!=`|不等于|
|`<`|小于|
|`>`|大于|
|`<=`|小于等于|
|`>=`|大于等于|
|`<=>`|三路比较|
|`&&`|逻辑与|
|`\|\|`|逻辑或|
|`<<`|左移|
|`>>`|右移|
|`<<=`|复合赋值运算符|
|`>>=`|复合赋值运算符|
|`++`|自增|
|`--`|自减|
|`,`|运算符,分隔|

</font>

# <font color=#ffe211> :star: cpp grammar details</font>

## <font color=#ffe211> :sparkles: address </font>

<font color=#ffa500>

|解引用|取地址|
|---|---|
|\*address|\&address|
|identifier语义：\*(&identifier) ||

</font>

> <font color=#39c5bb>n级内容::= '\*'(第n个地址);</font>
> <font color=#39c5bb>n级地址::= '&'(第n个地址);</font>

## <font color=#ffe211> :sparkles: 注释 </font>

```cpp
//单行
/*多行*/
```

## <font color=#ffe211> :sparkles: 标识符 </font>
> <font color=#39c5bb> `identifier`,`unqualified_id`,`qualified_id` </font>

* <font color=#ffe211> :rocket: 保留标识符:</font>       

<font color=#ffa500>

|关键字|    
|---|    
|单下划线开始的外部标识符|    
|单下划线后随大写字母开始的标识符|    
|双下划线开始的标识符|    
|标准库定义的所有外部标识符(有宿主环境中|    
|声明为实现或标准库未来使用保留的标识符|    
|声明为被潜在保留并且为实现所提供的标识符|    

</font> 

> <font color=#39c5bb>lvalue:可取地址有持久存储对象</font>    
> <font color=#39c5bb>prvalue:pure rvalue,字面量,运算结果的值</font>    
> <font color=#39c5bb>xvalue:expiring value,所绑定对象将不在</font>    
> <font color=#39c5bb>rvalue:临时的不持久存储位置,prvalue与xvalue并集</font>    
> <font color=#39c5bb>glvalue:generalized lvalue,lvalue与xvalue并集</font>    



## <font color=#ffe211> :sparkles: cpp运算符优先级 </font>

> <font color=#39c5bb> :rocket: 大体顺序：作用域、右单目、左单目、双目、关系、逻辑、赋值</font>

<font color=#ffa500>

| 优先级 | 运算符 | 描述 | 结合性 |
|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | `::` | 作用域解析 | 从左到右 |
| 2 | `++` `--`<br>`type()` `type{}`<br>`()`<br>`[]`<br>`.`<br>`->` | 后缀/后置增量和减量<br>函数风格转型<br>函数调用<br>数组下标<br>结构体和联合体成员访问<br>通过指针访问结构体和联合体成员 | 从左到右 |
| 3 | `++` `--`<br>`+` `-`<br>`!` `~`<br>`(type)`<br>`*`<br>`&`<br>`sizeof`<br>`co_await`<br>`new` `new[]`<br>`delete` `delete[]` | 前置增量和减量<br>正负号<br>逻辑非和按位非<br>c风格类型转换<br>间接寻址（解引用）<br>取地址<br>大小<br>await表达式<br>动态内存分配<br>动态内存分配 | 从右到左 |
| 4 | `.*` `->*` | 成员指针 | 从右到左 |
| 5 | `*` `/` `%` | 乘法、除法和取模 | 从左到右 |
| 6 | `+` `-` | 加法和减法 | 从左到右 |
| 7 | `<<` `>>` | 按位左移和右移 | 从左到右 |
| 8 | `<=>` | 三路比较 | 从左到右 |
| 9 | `<` `<=`<br>`>` `>=` | 分别用于关系运算符 < 和 ≤<br>分别用于关系运算符 > 和 ≥ | 从左到右 |
| 10| `==` `!=` | 分别用于关系运算符 = 和 ≠ | 从左到右 |
| 11| `&` | 按位与 | 从左到右 |
| 12| `^` | 按位异或（排他或） | 从左到右 |
| 13 | `\|` | 按位或（包含或） | 从左到右 |
| 14 | `&&` | 逻辑与 | 从左到右 |
| 15 | `\|\|` | 逻辑或 | 从左到右 |
| 16 | `?:`<br>`throw`<br>`co_yield`<br> `=`<br>`+=` `-=`<br>`*=` `/=` `%=`<br>`<<=` `>>=`<br>`&=` `^=` `\|=` | 三元条件<br>throw运算符<br>yield表达式<br>简单赋值<br>和差赋值<br>积、商和余数赋值<br>按位左移和右移赋值<br>按位与、异或和或赋值 | 从右到左 |
| 17 | `,` | 逗号 | 从左到右 |

</font>


## <font color=#ffe211> :sparkles: keywords </font>

### <font color=#ffe211> :rocket: 对齐 </font>

<font color=#ffa500>

|alignas|设置对齐要求,`<attribute_specifier>`里|
|---|---|
|alignof|查询对齐要求结果是`std::size_t`类型整数常量|

</font>

```cpp
//expression为整型常量表达式且2的幂次
alignas(expression)

//alignas(alignof(type_id))等价于
alignas(type_id)

//等价于对形参包的各个成员应用
//alignas(成员最大对齐要求)
alignas(pack...)
```

> <font color=#39c5bb>alignas用于类的声明定义,非数据成员,变量</font>    
> <font color=#39c5bb>当出现多个时使用最严格的那个alignas</font>    


> <font color=#39c5bb>查询其操作数类型的对齐要求:</font>    

```cpp
//返回std::size_t类型值
alignof(type)
```

### <font color=#ffe211> :rocket: 替用运算符 </font>

<font color=#ffa500>

|运算符|替用|
|---|---|
|`&&`|`and`|
|`&=`|`and_eq`|
|`&`|`bitand`|
|`\|`|`bitor`|
|`~`|`compl`|
|`!`|`not`|
|`!=`|`not_eq`|
|`\|\|`|`or`|
|`\|=`|`or_eq`|
|`^`|`xor`|
|`^=`|`xor_eq`|

</font>

### <font color=#ffe211> :rocket: 内联汇编 </font>

<font color=#ffa500>

|asm|
|---|

</font>

> <font color=#39c5bb>在`<asm_declaration>`中</font>    
> <font color=#39c5bb>Click :[https://gcc.gnu.org/onlinedocs/gcc/Extended-Asm.html](https://gcc.gnu.org/onlinedocs/gcc/Extended-Asm.html)</font>    

```cpp
//gcc as汇编器
asm asm-qualifiers ( AssemblerInstructions )

asm asm_qualifiers ( AssemblerTemplate 
                   : OutputOperands 
                 [ : InputOperands
                 [ : Clobbers ] ])

asm asm_qualifiers ( AssemblerTemplate 
                      : OutputOperands
                      : InputOperands
                      : Clobbers
                      : GotoLabels)

/*************
at&t:
	先src后dst
	指令跟后缀(`b`(byte),`w`(word),`l`(longword),`q`(quadword))表示operator size
	寄存器有前缀`%`
	立即数有前缀`$`
	地址也有前缀`$`
	直接寻址,解引用地址直接用`地址数字`
	间接寻址,解引用寄存器内地址用`()`
	用c语法的`0x`前缀表示十六进制数
	rep重复指令得分行

**************/
```


### <font color=#ffe211> :rocket: cv限定符 </font>

<font color=#ffa500>

|限定符|效果|
|---|---|
|`const`|编译器语义const限定对象地址中内容不可修改|
|`volatile`|对volatile读写认作可观测副效应，所以写入会在下一个序列点之前完成(不能被优化掉，被重排)|
|`__restrict`|指针地址内容与访问的对象地址绑定，在指针第一次被赋值开始的生命周期内，<br>只会由这一个restrict指针或通过它可衍生的指针来访问|

</font>

### <font color=#ffe211> :rocket: 事务内存 </font>

<font color=#ffa500>

|`synchronized`|
|---|
|`atomic_cancel`|
|`atomic_commit`|
|`atomic_noexcept`|

</font>

> <font color=#39c5bb>原子性：要么语句全部发生，要么全部不发生</font>     
> <font color=#39c5bb>隔离性：事务中语句不会观察其它事务写入一半</font>     

```ebnf
<Atomic_blocks> ::= ("atomic_noexcept"
                    |"atomic_cancel"
                    |"atomic_commit")
                    <compound_statement>

<synchronized_blocks> ::= "synchronized"
                          <compound_statement>

(#######################################)
<compound_statement>
```

### <font color=#ffe211> :rocket: 占位类型说明符 </font>

<font color=#ffa500>

|auto|
|---|

</font>

> <font color=#39c5bb>在`<placeholder_type_specifier>`中</font>     
> <font color=#39c5bb>可带类型约束,用于自动类型推导</font>     

```cpp
[type_constraint] auto
[type_constraint] decltype(auto)

//折叠规则
//& & -> &
//& && -> &
//&& & -> &
//&& && -> &&
```

### <font color=#ffe211> :rocket: 存储类说明符 </font>
> <font color=#39c5bb>翻译单元：一个源文件及其所有包含的头文件和宏展开后的内容</font>    

<font color=#ffa500>

|存储类说明符|存储期和链接|
|---|---|
|`无说明符`|自动存储期且无链接|
|`register`|自动存储期且无链接(不能取地址)|
|`static`|静态或线程存储期与内部链接|
|`extern`|静态或线程存储期与外部链接|
|`thread_local`|线程存储期|
|`mutable`|不影响存储或链接|

|存储期||
|---|---|
|自动存储期|于块中分配存储，退出该块时解分配存储|
|静态存储期|程序开始时分配，退出程序时解分配|
|线程存储期|线程开始时分配，结束线程时解分配|
|动态存储期|动态内存分配函数分配和解分配存储|


|链接||
|---|---|
|无链接|只能从其所在的作用域指代该标识符|
|内部链接|能从当前翻译单元的所有作用域指代该标识符|
|外部链接|能从整个程序的任何其他翻译单元指代该标识符|

</font>

### <font color=#ffe211> :rocket: 类型说明符 </font>
> <font color=#39c5bb>精准的长度的类型由cstdint引入std</font>    

<font color=#ffa500>

|type specifier||
|---|---|
|void|无类型void\*可以任意类型,f(void)表示不接收参数|
|nullptr\_t|decltype(nullptr)|
|bool|true 1,false 0|
|char|至少1byte|
|short|至少2byte|
|int|至少2byte|
|long|至少4byte|
|signed|有符号位|
|unsigned|无符号位|

|type specifier||
|---|---|
|char8\_t|足以表示u8|
|char16\_t|足以表示u16|
|char32\_t|足以表示u32|
|wchar\_t|足以表示任何受支持字符码位|

| 数据模型 | `char` | `short` | `int` | `long` | `long long` | pointer |
|---------|-------|--------|------|-------|-----------|------|
| **ILP32** (int long pointer32) | 8  | 16 | 32 | 32 | 64 | 32 |
| **LP32**  (long pointer32)     | 8  | 16 | 16 | 32 | 64 | 32 |
| **LP64**  (long pointer64)     | 8  | 16 | 32 | 64 | 64 | 64 |
| **LLP64** (long long pointer64)| 8  | 16 | 32 | 32 | 64 | 64 |
| **ILP64** (int long pointer64) | 8  | 64 | 64 | 64 | 64 | 64 |

|type specifier|浮点计算IEEE754|
|---|---|
|float|$ (-1)^{sign31} \times 2^{E30\_23-127} \times (1 + \sum _{i=1} ^{23} { b_{23-i} 2 ^{-i}}) $ |
|double|$ (-1)^{sign63} \times 2^{E62\_52-1023} \times (1 + \sum _{i=1} ^{52} { b_{52-i} 2 ^{-i}}) $|
